data.name: 探靈直播2
data.detailed_description:
※所有涉及性內容的人物都超過18歲。

＜概要＞

在化為廢墟的購物中心內，透過道具及線索提示逃出神秘人偶魔掌的橫向捲軸生存動作冒險遊戲。
玩家採取的行動將大幅左右少女們的命運。

＜系統＞

■三位直播主是否能平安會合，並成功逃脫？
陽葵、藍那、雅三人將於各自不同的地點展開探索。
需要切換角色來找出逃脫的線索。
究竟三人能否平安無事地全員會合，成功逃出廢棄購物中心呢？

■逃離襲擊而來的人偶魔掌，並逃出廢棄購物中心吧！
在三人探索廢棄購物中心的途中，神秘猴子人偶襲來！
遇到人偶後立即逃跑、躲藏，逃過追擊吧！

■探索廢棄購物中心，找出逃脫的線索！
為了逃出廢棄購物中心，需要獲得道具及線索。
仔細搜索廢棄購物中心內部，獲取逃脫所需的道具及線索吧！
還會出現阻擋三人去路的各種圈套謎團，善用獲得的道具及線索解開謎團吧！

＜登場人物＞

・愛月 陽葵　(Voice : Lynn）

・柊 藍那　(Voice :Mano Ayumi）
・姬宮 雅　(Voice :Nozomi Yamamoto）

＜工作人員＞

・角色設計:Waon Inui

・故事設計:Takayoshi Muto(Synthese)
・企劃/執行:Yujiro Usuda

data.short_description: 你能逃脫被追殺的恐怖嗎？恐怖生存遊戲 "探靈直播"的續集現已推出！ 在化為廢墟的購物中心內，透過道具及線索提示逃出神秘人偶魔掌的橫向捲軸生存動作冒險遊戲。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 Home
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6006U over
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: IntelR HD Graphics 520 over
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: 16 bit stereo, 48KHz WAVE file can be played
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 Home
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8500 over
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 over
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: 16 bit stereo, 48KHz WAVE file can be played

data.name: Livestream 2: Escape from Togaezuka Happy Place
data.detailed_description:
※All characters involved in sexual content are over the age of 18.

＜About＞

It's a side-scrolling survival action-adventure game in which players must escape from a mysterious mascot in an abandoned shopping mall, using items and hints as clues.
Depending on the player's choices, the fate of the girls will drastically change.

＜SYSTEM＞

・Will the three streamers be able to meet up again and manage to safely escape?


Himari, Aina, and Miyabi will start their searches from different locations.
By switching between the characters, you must find clues you need to escape. Will the three of them safely reunite and escape from the abandoned shopping mall without leaving anyone behind?


・Evade attacks from the mascot and escape from the mall!

While exploring the abandoned mall, the three are attacked by a mysterious mascot!
If you encounter the monkey mascot, run away immediately, hide, and escape its pursuit!


・Explore the abandoned mall and find clues to escape!

In order to escape from the abandoned shopping mall, you must acquire items and hints.
You must search all over the mall to find items and hints you need to escape. Furthermore, there are also various puzzles before the three. Use the items and hints you get to solve them!

＜CHARACTER＞

・Himari Aitsuki (Voice:Lynn）

・Aina Hiiragi (Voice:Mano Ayumi）
・Miyabi Himemiya (Voice :Nozomi Yamamoto）

＜STAFF＞

・Character Design:Waon Inui

・Scenario:Takayoshi Muto（Synthese）
・Producer:Yujiro Usuda

data.short_description: Can you escape the horror of being hunted down...? The sequel to the survival horror game "Livestream: Escape from Hotel Izanami" is now available!
data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 Home
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-6006U over
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: IntelR HD Graphics 520 over
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: 16 bit stereo, 48KHz WAVE file can be played
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 Home
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-8500 over
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 over
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: 16 bit stereo, 48KHz WAVE file can be played
